title: Strait of Hormuz LIVE updates: Rahul Gandhi warns of ‘repercussions’ amid Hormuz closure
description: Strait of Hormuz LIVE updates: On the 13th day of the war between Iran and Israel, oil prices surged as Brent crude rose above $100 a barrel early Thursday, days after briefly nearing $120, amid worsening supply concerns following Iranian attacks on commercial shipping near the Strait of Hormuz.
